name: attack_hostile_by_id
description: Attack a specific hostile entity by its ID
parameters: z.object({ hostile_id: z.number().describe("The unique entity ID of the hostile target to attack"), weapon: z.string().optional().describe("Optional name of the weapon to equip before attacking, e.g., 'stone_sword'") })

name: move_to_coordinate
description: Move to a target x/z coordinate using pathfinder to position for defense or attack
parameters: z.object({ x: z.number().describe("The target x coordinate to move to."), z: z.number().describe("The target z coordinate to move to."), radius: z.number().default(1).describe("The distance from the target center point at which to consider the movement complete.") })

name: defend_from_multiple_hosts
description: Defend against multiple approaching hostiles by positioning and engaging the nearest threat while managing distance

name: eat_food
description: Eat food items (bread, cooked meat, etc.) to restore health and hunger
parameters: z.object({ itemName: z.string().describe("The name of the food item to eat, e.g., 'bread' or 'cooked_beef'"), count: z.number().int().positive().default(1).describe("The number of food items to consume") })

name: kneel_and_defend
description: Move to a safer position and get ready for potential hostiles by kneeling and positioning defensively
parameters: z.object({ x: z.number().describe("The X coordinate of the safe position to move to"), z: z.number().describe("The Z coordinate of the safe position to move to"), radius: z.number().default(1).describe("The acceptable distance from the target coordinates") })

name: establish_defensive_position
description: Move to a safe defensive position with good visibility and ready to engage threats

name: equip_leather_tunic
description: Equip leather armor for protection against hostiles
parameters: z.object({ item: z.string().describe("The Minecraft name or display name of the item to equip, e.g., 'leather_chestplate' or 'Leather Tunic'") })

name: send_bread_to_player
description: Send bread items to a specified player for health recovery
parameters: z.object({ playerName: z.string().describe("The name of the player to send items to"), itemName: z.string().describe("The item name to send"), count: z.number().int().positive().describe("How many units of the item to send") })
code: const findItem = function(name) { const n = name.toLowerCase(); return bot.inventory.items().find(function(i) { return i.name.toLowerCase() === n || (i.displayName && i.displayName.toLowerCase() === n); }); }; const initialItem = findItem(args.itemName); if (!initialItem) { return "<NO_ITEM>: I do not have any " + args.itemName + "."; } if (initialItem.count < args.count) { return "<NOT_ENOUGH>: I only have " + initialItem.count + " " + args.itemName + "."; } if (!bot.players[args.playerName]) { return "<UNKNOWN_PLAYER>: Player " + args.playerName + " not found in player list."; } startBackgroundSkill(bot, 'send_bread_to_player', async function(token) { const movements = new Movements(bot); movements.canDig = false; bot.pathfinder.setMovements(movements); while (!token.cancelled && bot.health > 0 && !!bot.entity) { if (!bot.physicsEnabled) { await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 100); }); continue; } const targetPlayer = bot.players[args.playerName]; const targetEntity = targetPlayer ? targetPlayer.entity : null; if (!targetEntity) { await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 1000); }); continue; } const distance = bot.entity.position.distanceTo(targetEntity.position); if (distance <= 3) { bot.pathfinder.stop(); const deliveryItem = findItem(args.itemName); if (deliveryItem && deliveryItem.count >= args.count) { try { await bot.toss(deliveryItem.type, null, args.count); console.log("Delivered " + args.count + " " + args.itemName + " to " + args.playerName + "."); } catch (err) { console.error("Toss failed: ", err); } } break; } bot.pathfinder.setGoal(new goals.GoalFollow(targetEntity, 2)); await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 500); }); } }); return "<DELIVERING>: Traveling to " + args.playerName + " to deliver " + args.count + " " + args.itemName + ".";
